variables.spec: Create a rate limiter middleware for FastAPI using a sliding window algorithm. Support per-client rate limiting based on IP address. Allow configurable limits (requests per window) and window size. Return HTTP 429 with Retry-After header when limit is exceeded. Use an in-memory store with automatic cleanup of expired entries.

Create a retry decorator with exponential backoff for async functions. Support configurable max retries, initial delay, max delay, backoff multiplier, and a list of exception types to retry on. Add jitter to prevent thundering herd. Log each retry attempt with the exception details. Return the last exception if all retries are exhausted.

Generate a complete REST API for user CRUD operations using FastAPI and Pydantic v2. Include: POST /users (create), GET /users/{id} (read), PUT /users/{id} (update), DELETE /users/{id} (delete), GET /users (list with pagination). Use Pydantic models for request/response validation. Include proper HTTP status codes and error responses. Add type hints throughout.

Generate a database connection pool manager using asyncpg for PostgreSQL. Support configurable min/max pool size, connection timeout, idle timeout, and health checks. Implement acquire/release context manager pattern. Include connection validation on checkout. Handle connection failures gracefully with automatic reconnection. Add pool statistics (active, idle, total connections).

Generate a CLI tool using click that manages MLflow experiments. Subcommands: 'list' (list experiments with optional --status filter), 'create' (create experiment with --name and --tags), 'delete' (delete by name with --confirm flag), 'export' (export run metrics to CSV with --experiment and --output-path). Add --verbose flag for debug logging. Include input validation and helpful error messages.
